semantic_description: The function string_set_a updates a caller-owned character array of length n + 1 in place. It uses a for loop from i = 0 up to i < n to write 97 into each prefix position s[i], then writes 0 at index n as the terminator. The loop may execute zero times when n = 0. The function does not allocate or free memory and returns through the modified CharArray resource.
